steps.t: Jajax is in Abedec's Watch, the Corsair encampment in the ruins south of Dol Amroth. You should free Jajax from his bonds. <rgb=#FF0000>NOTE: Th…
Jajax is in the large tent at Abedec's Watch in southern Belfalas. You should speak with Jajax.
Lothíriel is in the Great Hall of the Prince in Dol Amroth. You should speak with Lothíriel.
